stages.concept:
# Unit 146: 주의해야 할 분사구문 (독립분사구문, with+목적어+분사) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **주의해야 할 분사구문**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **독립분사구문** — 주절과 부사절의 주어가 **다를 때**, 주어를 남겨요.

> **The weather being** fine, we went on a picnic.
> 날씨가 좋아서 우리는 소풍을 갔다.

> **Night coming** on, we started for home.
> 밤이 다가와서, 우리는 집으로 출발했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **비인칭 독립분사구문** — 관용적으로 쓰이는 표현

> **Generally speaking** — 일반적으로 말하면
> **Strictly speaking** — 엄격히 말하면
> **Judging from** — ~으로 판단하건대
> **Considering** — ~을 고려하면
> **Frankly speaking** — 솔직히 말하면

👩‍🏫 선생님: **with + 목적어 + 분사** — ~한 채로 (부대상황)

> She sat **with** her eyes **closed**.
> 그녀는 눈을 감은 채 앉아 있었다.

> He spoke **with** his arms **folded**.
> 그는 팔짱을 낀 채 말했다.

> Don't talk **with** your mouth **full**.
> 입에 음식을 넣은 채 말하지 마라.

**Q. 다음 문장의 (       )에 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"He was reading a book (       ) his legs crossed." (그는 다리를 꼰 채로 책을 읽고 있었다.)
1. by
2. in
3. with ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. '~를 한 상태로(채로)'라는 부대상황(동시동작)을 표현할 때는 **with + 목적어(his legs) + 분사(crossed)** 구문을 쓴답니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 주어가 다르면 독립분사구문, with+목적어+분사로 부대상황 표현! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 146: 주의해야할 분사 구문 독립분사구문, with+목적어+분사구문 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
(     ) , I went to the pharmacy for her.
> **정답** My sister being sick

---

**02.** She sat on the bench, with her eyes ? .
> **정답** closed

---

**03.** ? sunny, we went to the beach.
> **정답** It being (The weather being)

---

**04.** He was reading a book, with his legs ? .
> **정답** crossed

---

**05.** ? over, we went home.
> **정답** The game being (The match being)

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The weather being fine, she went for a walk.
(주어가 다른 분사구문 → 맞음/틀림?)
> **정답** 맞음 (독립분사구문)

---

**07.** Being fine weather, she went for a walk.
(주어가 다른 분사구문 → 맞음/틀림?)
> **정답** 틀림 → The weather being fine 또는 It being fine weather

---

**08.** She sat with her eyes closing.
(눈을 감고)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** closing → closed

---

**09.** He stood with his arms folding.
(팔짱을 끼고)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** folding → folded

---

**10.** She lay with her eyes opening.
(눈을 뜨고)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** opening → open

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
날씨가 좋아서 산책을 갔다. (독립분사구문)
fine, we went for a walk.
> **정답** The weather being

---

**12.** 그녀는 눈을 감고 앉아 있었다. (with 구문)
She sat with her eyes .
> **정답** closed

---

**13.** 시험이 끝나서 우리는 집에 갔다. (독립분사구문)
over, we went home.
> **정답** The test being

---

**14.** 그는 팔짱을 끼고 서 있었다. (with 구문)
He stood with his arms .
> **정답** folded (crossed)

---

**15.** 비가 와서 우리는 실내에 있었다. (독립분사구문)
raining, we stayed inside.
> **정답** It being (It)

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
날씨가 추워서 집에 있었다. (독립분사구문)
It cold being we stayed home
> **정답** It / being / cold / we / stayed / home

---

**17.** 그녀는 눈을 감고 누워 있었다. (with 구문)
She with lay her eyes closed
> **정답** She / lay / with / her / eyes / closed

---

**18.** 경기가 끝나서 집에 갔다. (독립분사구문)
The game over being we went home
> **정답** The / game / being / over / we / went / home

---

**19.** 그는 다리를 꼬고 앉아 있었다. (with 구문)
He with sat his legs crossed
> **정답** He / sat / with / his / legs / crossed

---

**20.** 비가 그쳐서 산책을 갔다. (독립분사구문)
The rain stopped having we went for a walk
> **정답** The / rain / having / stopped / we / went / for / a / walk
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 146: 주의해야할 분사 구문 독립분사구문, with+목적어+분사구문 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
If it's sunny, we will go on a picnic.
__________, we will go on a picnic.
It being sunny
Sunny
Being it sunny
Being sunny
> **정답** It being sunny

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 고르시오.
I listened to the music _______ my eyes closed.
of
with
for
by
> **정답** with

---

**03.** 주어진 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
분사구문을 고르시오.
그들은 팔짱을 낀 채 의자에 앉았다.
They sat on the chair __________.
as their arms crossing
as their arms crossed
with their arms crossing
with their arms crossed
> **정답** with their arms crossed

---

**04.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
As it was fine, we played baseball.
______________, we played baseball.
There being fine
Being fine
It being fine
Being it fine
> **정답** It being fine

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Although the work was very difficult, she did her best.
Being very difficult
The work being very difficult
The work was very difficult
Being the work very difficult
> **정답** The work being very difficult

---

**06.** 주어진 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
분사구문을 고르시오.
그는 입을 다문 채 침묵을 지켰다.
He remained silent __________.
as his mouth closed
his mouth closed
with his mouth closed
with his mouth closing
> **정답** with his mouth closed

---

**07.** 주어진 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
분사구문을 고르시오.
그는 불을 켜둔 채 집을 나섰다.
He left the house __________________.
with the light turn on
the light turned on
with the light turned on
with the light turning on
> **정답** with the light turned on

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두
고르시오. [2개]
Jack이 도움이 필요할 때 그의 아빠의 조언은 큰 힘이 되었다.
Jack needing help, his father's advice was a
huge help.
When Jack needed help, his father's advice
was a huge help.
Needing help, his father's advice was a huge
help.
Jack needed help, his father's advice was a
huge help.
> **정답** When Jack needed help, his father's advice was a huge help.
> **정답Jack needing help, his father's advice was a huge help.

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
의자가 부러져서, 나는 그 위에 앉을 수 없었다.
With the chair break, I couldn't sit on it.
With the chair broken, I couldn't sit on it.
The chair broken, I couldn't sit on it.
With the chair breaking, I couldn't sit on it.
> **정답** With the chair broken, I couldn't sit on it.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She was sitting on the chair with her leg
crossed.
Jack went to sleep with the light turned on.
They entered the building with their hands
waving.
He walked down the street with the dog
followed him.
> **정답** He walked down the street with the dog followed him.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
She stood with her hair flown in the wind.
He studied with the window closing.
It being lots of things to do, I can't go out.
Scientists continuing to study it, there are
many unknowns left in the universe.
> **정답** Scientists continuing to study it, there are many unknowns left in the universe.

---

**12.** 주어진 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
분사구문을 고르시오.
모두가 주목하며 그 토론은 시작되었다.
The debate began _______________.
with everyone paying attention to it
with everyone paid attention to it
as everyone paying attention to it
everyone paying attention to it
> **정답** with everyone paying attention to it

---

**13.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
Because it was raining, the picnic was canceled.
→ ______________________, the picnic was
canceled.
Because being raining
Being raining
It being raining
It was raining
> **정답** It being raining

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Being Friday, I watched a movie.
Not eating lunch, he is very hungry.
Ordering food, Monica is watching TV.
It being warm, we will go on a picnic.
> **정답** Being Friday, I watched a movie.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Lisa was playing the piano with Mike
watching.
She may feel comfortable with her arms
folding.
There being no food, my mom baked some
bread.
Today being a holiday, I stayed at home all
day long.
> **정답** She may feel comfortable with her arms folding.

---

**16.** 주어진 문장에서 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
She is reading a book with the cat slept.
틀린곳 → 정답
> **정답** slept, sleeping

---

**17.** 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
He said goodbye to his friend with his hand
waved.
틀린곳 → 정답
> **정답** waved, waving

---

**18.** 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
I kept playing with my leg injuring.
틀린곳 → 정답
> **정답** injuring, injured

---

**19.** 주어진 우리말 중 밑줄 친 부분을 알맞게 영작한 것을
고르시오.
___________________, we went on a field trip.
Being warm
It being warm
Being it warm
Be warm
> **정답** It being warm

---

**20.** 주어진 우리말 중 밑줄 친 부분을 알맞게 영작한 것을
고르시오.
아이가 울고 있어서 그녀는 전화를 받을 수 없었다.
She couldn't answer the phone
_____________________________.
the baby cried
with the baby cried
with the baby crying
with the baby cry
> **정답** with the baby crying
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 146 주의해야할 분사 구문 독립분사구문, with+목적어+분사구문중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
If Lisa wins the competition, her parents will
be very happy.
→  (     ) , her parents
will be very happy.
정답 Lisa winning the competition

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
He drank coffee, and she drank black tea in the
cafe.
→ He drank coffee,
 in the cafe.
정답 she drinking black tea

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
As the morning came, I heard a chicken crying.
→  (     ) , I heard a chicken crying.
정답 The morning coming

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
As it snowed a lot, we made a snowman.
→  (     )  a lot, we made a snowman.
정답 It snowing

---

**05.** with를 이용하여 두 문장을 한 문장으로 완성하시오.
Clara was crying. Tears ran down her face.
→ Clara was crying
 her face.
정답 with tears running down

---

**06.** with를 이용하여 두 문장을 한 문장으로 완성하시오.
I kept sleeping. The alarm clock was ringing.
→ I kept sleeping
.
정답 with the alarm clock ringing

---

**07.** with를 이용하여 두 문장을 한 문장으로 완성하시오.
Tom was reading a book. His sister was drawing a
picture.
→ Tom was reading a book
.
정답 with his sister drawing a picture

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 사용하여 문장을 만드시오.
(어법에 맞게 변형할 것)
그는 문을 잠그지 않은 채 외출했다.
힌트 (     ) the door, unlock
He went out  (     ) .
정답 with the door unlocked

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 사용하여 문장을 만드시오.
그 남자는 다리를 꼬고 벤치에 앉아 있었다.
힌트 (     ) his legs, cross
The man was sitting on the bench
.
정답 with his legs crossed

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 사용하여 문장을 만드시오.
(어법에 맞게 변형할 것)
머리가 흩날리는 채로 그녀는 가만히 서 있었다.
힌트 (     ) her hair, flutter
, she stood still.
정답 With her hair fluttering

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 146: 주의해야할 분사 구문 독립분사구문, with+목적어+분사구문 - 변형문제

**01.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If it's rainy, we will stay at home. __________, we will stay at home.
It being rainy Rainy Being it rainy Being rainy
> 정답: It being rainy

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 고르시오.
She listened to the lecture _______ her notebook open. of with for by
> 정답: with

---

**03.** 주어진 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 분사구문을 고르시오.
그들은 다리를 꼰 채 바닥에 앉았다.
They sat on the floor __________.
as their legs crossing as their legs crossed with their legs crossing with their legs crossed
> 정답: with their legs crossed

---

**04.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
As it was cloudy, we stayed indoors. ______________, we stayed indoors.
There being cloudy Being cloudy It being cloudy Being it cloudy
> 정답: It being cloudy

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분을 분사구문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Although the task was very challenging, she completed it on time.
Being very challenging The task being very challenging The task was very challenging Being the task very challenging
> 정답: The work being very difficult

---

**06.** 주어진 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 분사구문을 고르시오.
그녀는 눈을 감은 채 명상했다.
She meditated __________.
as her eyes closed her eyes closed with her eyes closed with her eyes closing
> 정답: with her eyes closed

---

**07.** 주어진 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 분사구문을 고르시오.
그녀는 에어컨을 켜둔 채 집을 나갔다.
She left the house __________________.
with the AC turn on the AC turned on with the AC turned on with the AC turning on
> 정답: with the light turned on

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Amy가 도움이 필요할 때 그녀의 엄마의 격려는 큰 힘이 되었다.
Amy needing help, her mother's encouragement was a huge help.
When Amy needed help, her mother's encouragement was a huge help. huge help.
Needing help, her mother's encouragement was a huge help.
Amy needed help, her mother's encouragement was a huge help.
> 정답: When Amy needed help, her mother's encouragement was a huge help.

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
다리가 부러져서, 나는 그 위를 걸을 수 없었다.
With the bridge break, I couldn't walk on it.
With the bridge broken, I couldn't walk on it.
The bridge broken, I couldn't walk on it.
With the bridge breaking, I couldn't walk on it.
> 정답: With the bridge broken, I couldn't walk on it.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He was sitting on the bench with his arms crossed.
Amy went to sleep with the fan turned on.
They entered the hall with their banners waving.
She walked down the hallway with the cat followed her.
> 정답: He walked down the street with the dog followed him.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
She stood with her scarf flown in the wind.
He studied with the door closing.
It being lots of things to do, I can't rest.
Researchers continuing to investigate, there are many mysteries left in the ocean.
> 정답: Scientists continuing to study it, there are many unknowns left in the universe.

---

**12.** 주어진 우리말에 맞게 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 분사구문을 고르시오.
모두가 집중하며 그 발표회는 시작되었다.
The presentation began _______________.
with everyone paying attention to it with everyone paid attention to it as everyone paying attention to it
everyone paying attention to it
> 정답: with everyone paying attention to it

---

**13.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Because it was snowing, the outdoor event was canceled. → ______________________, the outdoor event was canceled.
Because being snowing Being snowing It being snowing It was snowing
> 정답: It being snowing

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Being Saturday, I watched a drama.
Not eating dinner, she is very hungry.
Cooking pasta, Tom is watching a video.
It being cold, we will stay at home.
